texto: Our technologised society is becoming opaque. As technology becomes more ubiquitous and our relationship with digital devices ever more seamless, our technical infrastructure seems to be increasingly intangible.
explicacao: Citação de Honor Harger sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Our technologised society is becoming opaque. As technology becomes more ubiquitous and our relat…” articula reflexao, relationship, society em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como society.

texto: My job as artistic director at the Brighton digital agency Lighthouse is all about trying to show that digital culture is about more than just tools and gadgets - it's about perceiving the societal transformations being brought about by technology.
explicacao: Citação de Honor Harger sobre temas ligados a trabalho. “My job as artistic director at the Brighton digital agency Lighthouse is all about trying to show…” articula trabalho, culture, job em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e job.

frase_original: My job as artistic director at the Brighton digital agency Lighthouse is all about trying to show that digital culture is about more than just tools and gadgets - it's about perceiving the societal transformations being brought about by technology.

texto: We've been surrounded by images of space our whole lives, from the speculative images of science fiction to the inspirational visions of artists to the increasingly beautiful pictures made possible by complex technologies. But whilst we have an overwhelmingly vivid visual understanding of space, we have no sense of what space sounds like.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Honor Harger: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “We've been surrounded by images of space our whole lives, from the speculative images of science …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, beautiful, science pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e science.
